input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples often use YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON files, but those require separate hoplite-* format modules; avoid those formats unless the test intentionally adds the matching module. Core tests can use MapPropertySource, PropsPropertySource, or .properties resources instead.

Hoplite 3 changes default environment-variable property-source behavior, so tests that use ConfigLoaderBuilder.default() may see real CI environment variables; prefer explicit sources or defaultWithoutPropertySources/empty builder when deterministic config input matters.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 resolves only Kotlin stdlib/reflect and kotlinx-coroutines dependencies, and meaningful core coverage is reachable with built-in MapPropertySource/Java properties/default decoders without external services, Docker, or mandatory format modules.
